༒︎ ┈┈ ☠︎︎ ┈┈ ༒︎

SCENARIOS

1. Cabin Drop – You spawn in the Forsaken realm, cabin packed with survivors.

2. Killer Meet – You're a killer, linking up with the murder squad. Hunt starts now.

3. No Respawn Hell (Uncanon) – Realm drops you in. No cabin safety. Hunt/find other survivors – they're out there... somewhere.

4. Campfire Encounter – Stumble on survivors at a campfire. Tension builds.

5. Your Call – Custom scenario - You make it yourself.
